landing.heroSubtitle: YDA LAW OFFICE & Partners connects you with select Indonesian Lawyers instantly. Consult your case with Rusdi AI for free or schedule a video call with official legal experts.
landing.categoriesSubtitle: Find the best legal specialists tailored to your legal needs
landing.topLawyersSubtitle: Officially licensed lawyers with top ratings and proven experience
landing.processSubtitle: Just 4 easy steps to resolve your legal issues
landing.faqSubtitle: Answers to common questions about the YDA LAW OFFICE & Partners platform and our services

family.title: Family Law
family.desc: Divorce, child custody, inheritance, and other family legal matters.

business.title: Business Law
business.desc: Contracts, company incorporation, bankruptcy, and business disputes.

criminal.title: Criminal Law
criminal.desc: Criminal defense, domestic violence, fraud, and embezzlement.

civil.title: Civil Law
civil.desc: Land disputes, breach of contract, and compensation claims.

labor.title: Labor Law
labor.desc: Unfair dismissal, severance pay, workers' rights, and industrial disputes.

tax.title: Tax Law
tax.desc: Tax disputes, objection filings, and tax compliance.

inheritance.title: Inheritance Law
inheritance.desc: Estate distribution, grants, and inheritance rights disputes.

others.title: Other Categories
others.desc: Discover other legal specializations according to your needs.

step1.title: Register & Create Profile
step1.desc: Create an account in minutes and complete your legal profile.

step2.title: Consult with Rusdi AI
step2.desc: Tell Rusdi AI about your case for initial analysis and lawyer recommendations.

step3.title: Connect with Your Chosen Lawyer
step3.desc: Schedule a video consultation session with your chosen licensed lawyer.

faq.q1: Is the AI Rusdi consultation truly free?
faq.a1: Yes, consulting with AI Rusdi is completely free with no limits. You only pay if you decide to schedule a session with a human lawyer.
faq.q2: How do I choose the right lawyer for my case?
faq.a2: Rusdi AI will analyze your case and recommend the most suitable lawyer based on their specialization, experience, and ratings.
faq.q3: Is my case data safe and confidential?
faq.a3: Your data security is our priority. All communications are encrypted and only the lawyer you choose can access your case details.
faq.q4: How much does a lawyer consultation cost?
faq.a4: Fees vary depending on the lawyer and type of consultation. You can view transparent rates on each lawyer's profile before booking.

payment.title: Payment
payment.completePaymentHint: Complete payment to unlock your session
payment.securePaymentDesc: Payments are verified manually by the lawyer or admin before the consultation session opens.

payment.termsAgree: By paying, you agree to our Terms & Conditions.

payment.popupClosed: You can upload payment proof again from this page.
payment.demoModeDesc: Your payment proof was submitted successfully and is waiting for lawyer verification.
